title: Web3 Wallet Connect for Digital Sellers Explained for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a digital creator in Nigeria, trying to sell an ebook online. But PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are all blocked. You can't get paid for your hard work. This is exactly the kind of problem Unchained Commerce solves with Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration that lets buyers pay with 300+ coins. But what does that mean, and how does it work? Let's break it down.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Web3 Wallet Connect is a crucial tool for digital sellers in countries with restrictive payment platforms or for those who prefer to accept cryptocurrency payments. It's not just another payment processor; it's a bridge between the digital world of crypto and the real-world economy. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, beats, and plugins without worrying about geographic restrictions or complex KYC requirements.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind Web3 Wallet Connect is based on frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. This means that buyers can scan a QR code and pay with their preferred cryptocurrency, while you receive the funds in your local currency. The system is fully automated, so you don't need to worry about manual payment processing or exchange rate fluctuations.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The product types that work best with crypto-native delivery are any digital files that can be stored on a server and delivered via download link: ebooks in PDF or EPUB format, courses as video files or structured content packages, Notion templates as exported .notion files or share links, fonts as ZIP archives of OTF and TTF files, preset packs for Lightroom, Capture One, or DaVinci Resolve, beat files as WAV or MP3 archives, plugin installers, stock photo packs, and any other file-based product. The Core Shop Engine handles the delivery link generation and expiry, ensuring that download links are valid for a set time period and cannot be shared indefinitely after a single purchase.
Web3 Wallet Connect is a game-changer for digital sellers in restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard gives you visibility into every aspect of your store's operation. Every transaction appears in the log with the buyer's email, the product purchased, the payment amount in crypto and USD equivalent, the transaction hash for on-chain verification, and the delivery status. You can see at a glance whether the download link was sent, whether the email was delivered, and whether there are any orders requiring attention. Real-time analytics show you which products are selling, where your buyers are located geographically, and what coins they are using for payment. This visibility is what separates a professional digital store from a manual operation — you always know exactly what your store is doing.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand what Web3 Wallet Connect is and how it works, it's time to take action. First, visit the Unchained Commerce Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more about the technology and pricing. Then, sign up for Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and start selling your digital products using the frontend wallet integration. Finally, integrate NOWPayments to accept payments in 300+ coins.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell ebooks and digital products without using PayPal or Stripe? Yes, with Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your ebooks and digital products using a frontend wallet integration that accepts 300+ coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. The payment processing is fully automated, so you don't need to worry about manual payment processing or exchange rate fluctuations.
With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your ebooks and digital products without worrying about payment processing complexities.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell digital downloads without fees or restrictions, you might also be interested in selling ebooks and templates using a digital download store that accepts cryptocurrency payments. Check out the Unchained Commerce Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more about Web3 Wallet Connect and other payment solutions. With this technology, you can say goodbye to payment processing headaches and hello to a seamless selling experience.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your ebooks and digital products with Web3 Wallet Connect, follow these steps: purchase Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and integrate it with your website; sign up for NOWPayments to accept payments in 300+ coins; configure the frontend wallet integration to generate multi-chain QR codes; test the payment processing system to ensure seamless transactions; and start selling your digital products without worrying about payment processing headaches.
Web3 Wallet Connect accepts 300+ coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
